title: Jal Shey Mentor armor
content:
{{Top|leg}}
[[File:Jal_shey_mentor_armor.jpg|thumb|Jal Shey Mentor armor]]
'''Jal Shey Mentor armor''' was a type of [[Armor/Legends|armor]] worn by [[Jal Shey]] [[Jal Shey Mentor|mentors]]. The mentors were considered to be unparalleled in their intellect and were known to often serve as widely respected teachers and advisors. Though tougher than the similar armor used by [[Jal Shey Neophyte armor|neophytes]] and [[Jal Shey Advisor armor|advisors]], this [[Armor/Legends|armor]] was still lightweight and did not interfere with the usage of [[Force power/Legends|Force powers]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II: The Sith Lords]]'' {{1st}}
